page_metadata.biotools__summary: FiberSim is software for spatially-explicit modeling of half-sarcomeres. The code tracks the position and status of each myosin head, each binding site on actin, and each molecule of myosin-binding protein C.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FiberSim is software for spatially-explicit modeling of half-sarcomeres. The code tracks the position and status of each myosin head, each binding site on actin, and each molecule of myosin-binding protein C.
